critical_code_review_comments: MINOR (not user-visible text, but functional): /app/frontend/src/components/AppShell.jsx lines 24-26 still contain external hrefs pointing to https://getartcraft.ai/tutorials, /news, /faq for the Resources sidebar links. The visible LABELS say Tutorials/News/FAQ (no ArtCraft text), so this is not a visible-text rebrand bug, but users clicking those links will be sent to getartcraft.ai. Consider updating these URLs to the AI MARAYA equivalents (or removing until docs are ready). Note: browsers show the destination URL on hover in the status bar.
